SchoolData.title: SchoolData
SchoolData.description: Master record containing all student info, grades, billing, attendance, schedules, and staff credentials.

students.description: List of enrolled student profiles and their continuous assessment scores

teachers.description: List of teaching staff, credentials, and class assignments

classes.description: List of JHS/SHS class divisions and subject courses

config.description: Global school configuration variables including terminal fees rules

/school_data/{documentId}.description: Collection storing the master school database records
